Spring Data for Apache Cassandra Core
  1. org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support

Packages that use org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support
Support infrastructure for query derivation of Apache Cassandra specific repositories.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support used by org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.support
    Class
    Description
    CassandraRepositoryFactory
    Factory to create CassandraRepository instances.
    CassandraRepositoryFragmentsContributor
    Cassandra-specific RepositoryFragmentsContributor contributing fragments based on the repository.
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFactory
    Factory to create ReactiveCassandraRepository instances.
    ReactiveCassandraRepositoryFragmentsContributor
    Reactive Cassandra-specific RepositoryFragmentsContributor contributing fragments based on the repository.
